title: Special Methods and Pythonic Object Behavior · Runtime Lens: Oop Repr Str
summary: Make domain values readable, comparable, hashable, iterable, callable, and resource-safe only where meaningful. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Implement __repr__ for unambiguous developer evidence and __str__ for user-facing text without leaking secrets.
Use null objects or strategies when they preserve a real role contract better than repeated None branching.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
